definition: The emerging platform mechanism (reference target / cross-root ARIA delegation) for letting an ARIA relationship (aria-labelledby, aria-controls, aria-activedescendant) point across a shadow-DOM boundary, so a component can wire accessibility to elements inside another component’s shadow root.
usage: Resolved via the capabilityMatrix as the accessibility substrate for composed shadow-DOM components; a manual id-reflection shim is the fallback until it is Baseline.
